name: Count Vectorizer
description: Extracts the vocabulary from a given collection of documents and generates a vector of token counts for each document.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and transforms it to another DataFrame
output: It adds a new column to the incoming DataFrame containing the vector of token counts in the input column, to generate the output DataFrame

fields.name: minDF
fields.title: Min DF
fields.description: Specifies the minimum number of different documents a term must appear in to be included in the vocabulary

fields.name: maxDF
fields.title: Max DF
fields.description: Specifies the maximum number of different documents a term could appear in to be included in the vocabulary

fields.name: minTF
fields.title: Min TF
fields.description: Filter to ignore rare words in a document

fields.name: binary
fields.title: Binary
fields.description: Binary toggle to control the output vector values.
